notes: Exhaustive regression suite for media-tools routing, AI image generation, Optimo optimization, companion-skill boundaries, and legacy skill replacement.

evals.prompt: Generate a 16:9 hero image for a fintech landing page with abstract gradients and trust cues.
evals.expected_output: Routes to the generate path, uses Flash model by default, and names generate.py or inline google-genai.
assertions: Defaults to gemini-3.1-flash-image-preview unless pro is requested.

evals.prompt: Use media-tools to convert every PNG in public/images to WebP and keep originals until I verify.
evals.expected_output: Routes to optimize with dry-run first, pinned optimo@0.0.24, and explicit format conversion.

evals.prompt: Generate a product mockup, then convert it to WebP for my html-presentation deck.
evals.expected_output: Sequences generate then optimize; returns to html-presentation only for deck integration.
assertions: Does not make html-presentation the primary handler.

evals.prompt: I'm building a playground artifact and need a generated texture seed before extracting visual grammar.
evals.expected_output: Routes to media-tools generate for one bitmap seed; playground owns HTML/SVG rebuild.
assertions: Keeps one inspiration seed, not multiple directions.

evals.prompt: Use media-tools to edit ./logo.png — remove the background and add a soft drop shadow.
evals.expected_output: Uses generate.py with --input-image for editing mode.
assertions: Uses generate.py or inline editing code.
Does not switch to pro model without request.

evals.prompt: Generate a higher-quality nano banana pro poster at 2K, 4:5 aspect ratio.
evals.expected_output: Uses gemini-3-pro-image-preview because user explicitly asked for pro.
assertions: Selects pro model only because user asked.
Does not use deprecated gemini-2.x models.

evals.prompt: I need an AI mockup of a dark-mode dashboard settings screen.
evals.expected_output: Triggers media-tools generate with Flash default.
assertions: Does not route to playground or html-presentation.

evals.prompt: Generate a multi-element infographic about photosynthesis with labels — use thinking for composition.
evals.expected_output: Uses TEXT,IMAGE modalities and --thinking High for complex composition.
assertions: Enables thinking High for complex prompt.
Uses TEXT,IMAGE when text labels matter.

evals.prompt: Call the deterministic media-tools script to generate a 1:1 icon and parse JSON stdout.
evals.expected_output: Documents generate.py JSON contract with path, text, model, usage.

evals.prompt: Dry-run optimo on public/media before optimizing the whole folder.
evals.expected_output: Uses npx optimo@0.0.24 with --dry-run on directory.

evals.prompt: Compress deck.mp4 and convert it to WebM, keeping audio.
evals.expected_output: Uses optimo video pipeline with --format webm and --mute false.

evals.prompt: Resize hero.png to width 960px with optimo before committing.
evals.expected_output: Uses --resize w960 on optimize path.

evals.prompt: Convert screenshots/heic-batch to AVIF for the static site.
evals.expected_output: Uses optimo --format avif with dry-run recommendation for batch.
assertions: Recommends testing one file or dry-run first.

evals.prompt: These slide images are 4MB each — shrink them for the deck without changing layout.
evals.expected_output: Routes to optimize compression, not html-presentation deck build.
assertions: Does not start Reveal.js deck construction.
May mention returning to deck integration after optimize.

evals.prompt: Build a Reveal.js HTML presentation deck from this outline with speaker notes.
evals.expected_output: Routes to html-presentation, not media-tools.
assertions: Does not use media-tools as primary workflow.
Does not start image generation or optimo.

evals.prompt: Run a Codex review on this implementation plan before I ship.
evals.expected_output: Routes to codex skill, not media-tools.
assertions: Does not invoke generate or optimo.

evals.prompt: Find the crux in this onboarding strategy — should we fix activation or add premium features first?
evals.expected_output: Routes to crux, not media-tools.
assertions: Names crux or weak joint framing.
Does not invoke image generation or compression.

evals.prompt: How do I center a flex container vertically in CSS?
evals.expected_output: Answers CSS directly without loading media-tools.

evals.prompt: Use /generate-image to make a square app icon for our settings page.
evals.expected_output: Routes to media-tools generate; does not claim generate-image still exists as a separate skill.
assertions: Does not tell user to install generate-image separately.
Sets 1:1 aspect ratio for square icon.

evals.prompt: Run media-optimizer on assets/ before I commit these PNGs.
evals.expected_output: Routes to media-tools optimize with optimo@0.0.24; does not reference deleted media-optimizer skill.
assertions: Does not claim media-optimizer is a separate skill.
